test-method.name: testCreatePatientAllValidFields
test-method.description: TC_P01 – Create patient with all valid required fields

test-method.name: testCreatePatientWithPrefixMrs
test-method.description: TC_P02 – Create patient with prefix Mrs.

test-method.name: testCreatePatientWithPrefixMs
test-method.description: TC_P03 – Create patient with prefix Ms.

test-method.name: testCreateFemalePatient
test-method.description: TC_P04 – Create female patient

test-method.name: testCreatePatientMarried
test-method.description: TC_P05 – Create patient with marital status Married

test-method.name: testPatientAppearsInSearch
test-method.description: TC_P06 – Verify patient appears in search after creation

test-method.name: testCreatePatientSpanishLanguage
test-method.description: TC_P07 – Create patient with language preference Spanish

test-method.name: testSubmitBlankForm
test-method.description: TC_N01 – Submit form with all fields blank

test-method.name: testMissingFirstName
test-method.description: TC_N02 – Submit without First Name

test-method.name: testMissingLastName
test-method.description: TC_N03 – Submit without Last Name

test-method.name: testMissingDOB
test-method.description: TC_N04 – Submit without Date of Birth

test-method.name: testMissingPhone
test-method.description: TC_N05 – Submit without Phone Number

test-method.name: testInvalidEmailFormat
test-method.description: TC_N06 – Submit with invalid email format (no @)

test-method.name: testInvalidEmailMissingDomain
test-method.description: TC_N07 – Submit with email missing domain

test-method.name: testShortPhoneNumber
test-method.description: TC_N08 – Submit with phone number less than 10 digits

test-method.name: testAlphaInPhoneNumber
test-method.description: TC_N09 – Submit with letters in phone number field

test-method.name: testFutureDOB
test-method.description: TC_N10 – Submit with future date as Date of Birth

test-method.name: testNumericFirstName
test-method.description: TC_N11 – Submit with numbers in First Name
